ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blogs" (
  "blog_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each blog */,
  "blog_name" TEXT /* Name of the blog */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blog */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the blog was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the blog was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blog owner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the blog (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the blog (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_themes" (
  "blog_id" TEXT /* ID of the blog */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "customizations" TEXT /* Customizations made to the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id", "theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "attribute_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute value */,
  "blog_id" TEXT /* ID of the blog */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_blog_id FOREIGN KEY ("blog_id") REFERENCES blogs ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "blog_id" TEXT /* ID of the blog */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post author */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_posts_blog_id FOREIGN KEY ("blog_id") REFERENCES blogs ("blog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "blog_id" TEXT /* ID of the blog */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media platform */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_blog_id FOREIGN KEY ("blog_id") REFERENCES blogs ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rss_feeds" (
  "rss_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSS feed */,
  "blog_id" TEXT /* ID of the blog */,
  "rss_feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the RSS feed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the RSS feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rss_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rss_feeds_blog_id FOREIGN KEY ("blog_id") REFERENCES blogs ("blog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the post was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_views_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "liker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liker */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the post was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_likes_liker_id FOREIGN KEY ("liker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_post_comments_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "liker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liker */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_comments_likes_liker_id FOREIGN KEY ("liker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_post_comments_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spam_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporter */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seo_metadata" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* SEO title of the post */,
  "description" TEXT /* SEO description of the post */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)
